description: Square ICE card laid over a desaturated grayscale photograph of a bearded man with short dark hair, indoors (a door and wall are faintly visible behind him); the portrait is soft and slightly blurred. The left side has a dark translucent panel with a cyan or light blue serif headline 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' and a white subhead '1/27/2025 | San Diego, CA'. Below in large white sans-serif: 'Afghan National'. A bulleted 'CRIMES:' list reads: 'Known or suspected terrorist' and 'Existing removal order'. The DHS/ICE seal and 'ICE' wordmark are in the lower-left corner, and a red diagonal corner banner in the lower-right reads 'SAN DIEGO'. The photograph is high-contrast monochrome.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/27/2025 | San Diego, CA; Afghan National; CRIMES: Known or suspected terrorist, Existing removal order; SAN DIEGO
